name: Ben Carson
subject: Hillary Clinton’s foreign policy “experience”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
Peter,

You can easily argue that Hillary Clinton has more foreign policy
"experience" than every Republican running for President -- and
you can bet the media will remind us every day.

But experience does not equal judgment.

For his entire presidency, President Obama has pursued a strategy
of "leading from behind" and has either underestimated or ignored
the threat of Islamic radicalism.

As his Secretary of State, Hillary Clinton was the tip of the
spear. She was in charge of implementing President Obama's empty
rhetoric policies. And they've failed miserably.

As your Commander-in-Chief, I will speak the truth about radical
Islam. I will work with our Middle Eastern allies to help the
Syrian refugees resettle in the region rather than bringing tens
of thousands to our shores. I will keep terrorists off the
battlefield by keeping Guantanamo Bay open. I will work to
eliminate ISIS quickly and decisively because they cannot be
contained.

I've had enough of the whining. It's time to start winning.
Please stand with me by making a donation of any amount to my
campaign now.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/32022462:sGFmXoyUN:m:3:1155937413:DE7FCA60CAEE0B5F66F9B59E803566A7:r

Together, President Obama and Secretary Clinton lied about the
terrorist attack on our consulate in Benghazi. They have failed
to name our enemy -- radical Islam -- and have downplayed the
threat it poses to Western civilization.

Sure, Secretary Clinton has experience -- but that experience is
in walking away from America's responsibilities and making the
world a more dangerous place.

It's time for a new direction. It's time for decisive American
leadership.

Please stand with me right now by making a donation of any amount
to my campaign.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/32022462:sGFmXoyUN:m:3:1155937413:DE7FCA60CAEE0B5F66F9B59E803566A7:r

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

Paid for by Carson America, Inc.

This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc., Post Office Box
620590, Middleton, WI 53562

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Carson
America, Inc. and is not an endorsement by Scott Walker. You are
receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Scott
Walker's online community.

Click below if you would prefer to not receive future emails from
Carson America, Inc.

https://email.granitelists.com/form/103832/4203/preferences?enc=sGFmXoyUN&eemail=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mhash=d231af507b993d480d9636d8f3506493

name: Rand Paul
subject: The cover of the NY Daily News...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Have you seen this?

This cover on the New York Daily News is a
deplorable example of the media putting their political agenda
over the suffering of victims and their families. The genuine
thoughts and prayers offered to victims in need are not political
fodder.
This attack represents a fundamental problem
with the media and politics in general. Attacking religious
sentiments to promote an agenda as tragedy strikes is despicable.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Mark Campbell
subject: 90 Days to Victory
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

Virginia is a
critically important state for Ted Cruz, and all of us at Cruz
for President want to remind you that the Virginia primary is
only 90 days away. March 1st, 2016, "Super Tuesday" will be a
great day for Courageous Conservatives -- not only in Virginia,
but also across our nation. Your active participation in the
Virginia campaign is critical. We are well-positioned and
building momentum heading into the final stretch. With your help,
we will elect Ted Cruz President of the United States.

Faith, family,
country, and liberty are but a few of the shared values that
unite us. Those shared values, along with quality
neighbor-to-neighbor contact, will lead to victory. We are asking
all of our Cruz Crew friends and volunteers to talk to their
friends, family, neighbors, and co-workers on behalf of Ted Cruz.
Your personal engagement with the people you know best is the
type of quality communication and interaction that will lead us
to victory on March 1st, 2016.

Please volunteer as a
Cruz Crew Captain. Our voter engagement process will be as simple
as 1, 2, and 3.

1. Download the
app and then forward information sent by the campaign to your
friends, family, neighbors, co-workers, and your entire social
network.

2. Neighbor to
neighbor calls: Reach out to your friends, family, neighbors,
co-workers, and entire social network through friendly phone
calls, emails, and social media asking them to support Ted Cruz
for President (you will be provided with campaign literature that
you can share and from which you can speak).

3. Volunteer as
much or as little as you'd like for campaign events in your
community by using our digital outreach tools. You can rally your
friends, family, neighbors, and co-workers to vote for Ted Cruz
for President on March 1st, 2016.

Most of all thank you
so very much for your help and support so far. Together, we have
built a dynamic grassroots campaign. Now it is up to each of us
to put in the extra effort and finish strong. As we look ahead to
these final 90 days, our combined efforts will produce the result
we have been working so hard to secure - a Ted Cruz victory on
primary night!

For Faith, Family,
Country, and Liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political
Director
Cruz for President

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

name: Rand Paul for President
subject: Media says I'm to blame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
To the national media and Big Government
pals, the script is always the same.
Even before facts rolled in about yesterday's
horrific shootings in San Bernardino, California that left 14
dead and 17 more wounded, Hillary Clinton and President Barack
Obama were loudly calling for new gun control schemes.
And the front page of at least one major
newspaper this morning says I'm to blame for standing up to past
anti-gun measures in Washington, D.C.!
They're exploiting the deaths of innocent
Americans to further their plans to dismantle the 2nd Amendment,
destroy conservatives, and as we saw today, attack faith and
prayer. The victims are just another helpful talking point for
the left.
Patriot, all of this sickens me to the core.

The families of those who died or were
wounded deserve more than this.
But all is fair in the liberal war against
the Constitution.
And I know more is coming . . . I know those
who try to twist every tragedy to push their Big Government,
anti-gun political agenda are not going to give up.
They think our freedom is to blame for every
bad that happens. And their proposed solution to every problem is
more government -- more liberalism.
Patriot, I'm not playing by their rules.
And those who are serious about restoring
this country can't afford to either.
As we pray for those who lost loved ones
yesterday, I'm afraid we must also brace for yesterday's attacks
to be compounded with attacks on our liberty.
They've already started. And it's going to
get worse.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Tuesday in Rockville: Call voters for Bernie!
body:
#
# **You're invited: Call voters for Bernie**
**Host: **Fellow Bernie Supporter in Rockville
**What:** Phone Banking in Rockville, MD
**Where:** Dolly Madison Room, Hamilton House, Americana Centre
4 Monroe Place
Rockville, MD 20850
**When:** Tuesday, December 8th
6:00 pm EST
**[Yes, I'll be there.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4r3lb)**
**[Click here to RSVP and for more info»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4r3lb)**
The other billionaire-backed candidates are counting on money to win this election. Bernie's counting on us. He wants you to help him build a people's campaign and win this election with the support of millions of Americans.
**This is how we win. Bernie needs us to volunteer and help share his message with millions of Americans.**
Will you make calls Tuesday at 6:00 pm EST in Rockville to build the political revolution and help Bernie win?
**[Click here for more details and to RSVP.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4r3lb)**
Can't make it Tuesday? **[Check our map](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb269d/43f17890/4eabe6ab/6215f460/3041166384/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=R&eventtype=CW&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&eventtype=O&daterange=all-events&sort=time")** to find other events near you.
With the Iowa caucuses just weeks away, this is go time. Let's make some calls for Bernie.
\- Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb269d/43f17890/4eabe6ab/6215f461/3041166384/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb269d/43f17890/4eabe6ab/6215f46e/3041166384/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb269d/43f17890/4eabe6ab/6215f46f/3041166384/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb269d/43f17890/4eabe6ab/6215f46c/3041166384/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rand Paul for President
subject: How we stop extremists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
Earlier today, I introduced the Stop
Extremists Coming Under Refugee Entry Act (SECURE Act).
This bill will do 3 things to immediately
increase the security of this country.

Suspend the U.S. visa program for
countries that pose a high-risk.

Enhances screenings for high-risk
refugees.

Imposes a waiting period for background
checks on visa issuance from other countries.

I believe that securing our border and
monitoring who enters and exits our country is pertinent to
protecting the homeland.
If you agree please stand with me by donating
today.

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

As president, I will do everything I can to
guard America and the ideals upon which our nation was founded.
A couple of weeks ago, I introduced an
amendment that would defund new refugees from high-risk countries
and this latest bill is just the next step.
I'm not backing down.
The tragedy in Paris was a big lesson for us
in America. Open borders and blanket amnesty without proper
security are not options if we want our country to be safe here
at home. It is time for a common sense program that requires
special scrutiny for anyone coming here from countries that have
hotbeds of radical jihadism.
I previously put forth an Amendment to the
2013 immigration bill called 'Trust but Verify' that would have
made our country more safe. Unfortunately, that bill was blocked
by Marco Rubio and Chuck Schumer's backroom deal with the Gang of
8.
Now look at where we are? We have no choice
but to put strict policies in place to keep our country safe.
If the administration doesn't have the
ability to guarantee that the vetting process is working, if
Americans cannot be guaranteed that we are not allowing
terrorists to enter this country disguised as refugees, then we
cannot continue to fund their entrance into this nation.
Now is the time to stand strong for the
security of our country and make certain that protections are in
place to make sure what happened in Paris does not happen here in
America.
Will you stand with me?
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

DONATE NOW >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: STOP Pat Toomey
subject: BREAKING VOTE: Senate strips health care
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**BREAKING: Pat Toomey votes to strip health care from 450,000 Pennsylvanians**
[**RUSH $5 to dump Toomey and elect Katie now >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7121898449351475200/-162953120794542080?refcode=e20151203&refcode2=e20151203nd&amount=5)
Friend --

Just minutes ago, Pat Toomey voted yes on a Senate bill to REPEAL Obamacare and strip Medicaid away from 450,000 Pennsylvanians.

**[We need to show Pat Toomey RIGHT NOW that we're ready for a leader who fights to expand health care access, not repeal it! RUSH $5 or whatever you can to dump Pat Toomey and help elect Katie McGinty.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7121898449351475200/-162953120794542080?refcode=e20151203&refcode2=e20151203nd&amount=5)**

Under Governor Wolf's leadership, we've expanded Medicaid access so that 600,000 more Pennsylvanians have access to affordable health care. Now, Pat Toomey has voted to strip away health care from hundreds of thousands of our neighbors -- without any plan for replacing that desperately needed coverage.

**Republican Pat Toomey is promoting his rigid partisan ideology instead of fighting to protect the families he was elected to serve.** It's despicable, and we're fed up with his five years of failed leadership.

**[If you're ready for a senator who will stand up for health care and support hardworking families, make an immediate donation to Katie's campaign here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7121898449351475200/-162953120794542080?refcode=e20151203&refcode2=e20151203nd&amount=5)**

Thank you,

STOP Pat Toomey
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7121898449351475200/-162953120794542080?refcode=e20151203&refcode2=e20151203nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I want to talk to you about gun violence
body:
# [](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa4/3156799923/VEsH/ "http://berniesanders.com")
Dear Sisters and Brothers -
Here is the very sad truth: it is very difficult for the American people to keep up with the mass shootings we seem to see every day in the news. Yesterday, San Bernardino. Last week, Colorado Springs. Last month, Colorado Springs again. Newtown, Aurora, Tucson, Isla Vista, Virginia Tech, Navy Yard, Roseburg, and far too many others.
The crisis of gun violence has reached epidemic levels in this country to the point that we are averaging more than one mass shooting per day. Now, I am going to tell you something that most candidates wouldn't say: I am not sure there is a magical answer to how we end gun violence in America. But I do know that while thoughts and prayers are important, they are insufficient and it is long past time for action.
That's why I want to talk to you today about a few concrete actions we should take as a country that will save lives.
**[Add your name in support of the following commonsense measures Congress can take to make our communities safer from gun violence.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa5/3156799923/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gun-violence-prevention?source=em151203")**
> 1\. We can **expand background checks** to keep guns out of the hands of criminals and the dangerously mentally ill. This is an idea that over 80% of Americans agree with, even a majority of gun owners.
> 2\. & 3\. We can **renew the assault weapons ban** and **end the sale of high capacity magazines** -- military-style tools created for the purpose of killing people as efficiently as possible.
> 4\. Since 2004, over 2,000 people on the FBI's terrorist watch list have legally purchased guns in the United States. **Let 's close the "terror gap"** and make sure known foreign and domestic terrorists are included on prohibited purchaser lists.
> 5\. We can **close loopholes in our laws that allow perpetrators of stalking and dating violence to buy guns.** In the United States, the intended targets of a majority of our mass shootings are intimate partners or family members, and over 60% of victims are women and children. Indeed, a woman is five times more likely to die in a domestic violence incident when a gun is present.
> 6\. We should **close the loophole that allows prohibited purchasers to buy a gun without a completed background check after a three-day waiting period expires.** Earlier this year, Dylann Roof shot and killed nine of our fellow Americans while they prayed in a historic church, simply because of the color of their skin. This act of terror was possible because of loopholes in our background check laws. Congress should act to ensure the standard for ALL gun purchases is a completed background check. No check -- no sale.
> 7\. It's time to **pass federal gun trafficking laws.** I support Kirsten Gillibrand's Hadiya Pendleton and Nyasia Pryear-Yard Gun Trafficking & Crime Prevention Act of 2015, which would "make gun trafficking a federal crime and provide tools to law enforcement to get illegal guns off the streets and away from criminal networks and street gangs."
> 8\. It's time to **strengthen penalties for straw purchasers** who buy guns from licensed dealers on behalf of a prohibited purchaser.
> 9\. We must **authorize resources for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to study and research the causes and effects of gun violence** in the United States of America.
> 10\. According to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, there are over 21,000 firearm suicides every year in the United States. It's time we **expand and improve our mental health capabilities** in this country so that people who need care can get care when they need it, regardless of their level of income.
[**Add your name in support of these commonsense measures Congress can take to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa5/3156799923/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gun-violence-prevention?source=em151203")
Earlier today, the U.S. Senate voted against non-binding legislation to expand background checks, close the "terror gap," and improve our mental health systems. I voted for all three, although each of them came up short.
They failed for the same reason the bipartisan Manchin-Toomey legislation failed in 2013, just months after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School: because of the financial political power of a gun lobby that has bought candidates and elections for the better part of the last several decades.
In 2014 alone, the gun lobby spent over $30 million on political advertising and lobbying to influence legislators in Congress and state capitals across the country. And just last month, it was reported that the Koch brothers made a $5 million contribution to the NRA.
**Americans of all political stripes agree. It's time to address the all too common scene of our neighbors being killed. It's time to pass a common sense package of gun safety legislation.**
With your help, that's what we'll do when I'm president.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Sign Our Petition](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa5/3156799923/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/gun-violence-prevention?source=em151203")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa2/3156799923/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa3/3156799923/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa0/3156799923/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Our political revolution is built by a massive volunteer organization -- [tell us how you can help our campaign](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2681/43f17890/4e896865/6215efa1/3156799923/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/work?source=email_footer").
